ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'DesignAndProposal', INCLUDES(PerformanceFeeMethod__c, 'HighWaterMark'), ISBLANK(TEXT( Clawback__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide a value for Clawback if Performance Fee Method Contains "HighWaterMark".
